title: ERROR: Cannot give out discounts - 403 error on plans API
excerpt:
Something bad is going on. I can’t give ppl discounts. 
The plan dropdown is empty and there’s hundreds of requests to: 
https://:account_slug.monday.com/apps_ms/apps_backoffice/apps/:app_id/plans 
  
Cc: @Matias.Monday @…

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Something bad is going on. I can’t give ppl discounts.

The plan dropdown is empty and there’s hundreds of requests to:
https://:account_slug.monday.com/apps_ms/apps_backoffice/apps/:app_id/plans

Screenshot 2023-04-19 at 22.12.452574×1678 506 KB

Cc: @Matias.Monday @shaulgittelman

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dvdsmpsn,

I’m so sorry to hear about this! I’ve reported this issue to the team and will update you as soon as I hear back. In the mean time, can you please send me your app ID you’re having issues with?

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
@rachelatmonday As I hoped. Sleep on it and the problem goes away.

Aside: it looks like you folks might be trying to fix the fact that we can’t change prices after submitting an app. I see the V1 suffix on the dropdown items:

Screenshot 2023-04-20 at 09.51.141318×1462 89.4 KB

fyi: the app_id is 10029356.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @dvdsmpsn,

The fix was deployed in the last couple of hours

Our team is always working to improve the monetization system. We will announce any changes so you are all in the loop!

Cheers,
Matias
